audit_items.proof_trace: returnData is initialized as `new bytes[](calls.length)` (L56), making returnData.length == calls.length a structural invariant enforced by Solidity's fixed-size array semantics — the length cannot change post-allocation. The loop iterates exactly calls.length times (L58-60) with no early exit; _call either returns data or reverts the entire transaction (L30-43), so no partial return is reachable. The invariant holds unconditionally on any successful completion of _multiCall.
